pilots.name: GSM8K matched-compute compute curve
pilots.description: 在 GSM8K 100 样本上对 Standard / DNB / Prophet / CORE / Entropy / TIGER 做 matched actual compute 比较，检查 nominal-vs-actual 口径是否改变关键排序。

pass_criteria.info_gain_pass: At least one comparison changes qualitatively after actual-compute normalization, or nominal-vs-actual mismatch exceeds 10% for a key method.
pass_criteria.low_value_fail: All rankings are unchanged and actual-compute mismatch is negligible (<5%) across the board.

pilots.name: GSM8K signal-control gap 审计
pilots.description: 审计 entropy / instability / calibration 的 error correlation、revision-benefit correlation 与最终 control effectiveness 是否错位。

pass_criteria.gap_pass: At least one signal shows strong diagnostic quality (|corr| >= 0.4 or clear ranking separation) while revision gain remains <= 1% over entropy or standard.
pass_criteria.gap_fail: Signal quality and control quality are effectively identical, offering no diagnostic-control gap.

pilots.name: MATH500 shortlist transfer
pilots.description: 在 MATH500 100 样本上复测 Standard / CORE / Entropy / TIGER 的排序，判断 GSM8K 叙事是否迁移到第二 reasoning benchmark。

pass_criteria.transfer_pass: Either the ranking differs from GSM8K in an informative way, or the same diagnostic story replicates strongly enough to support task-dependent claims.
pass_criteria.transfer_fail: All methods cluster within 1% with no interpretable ranking pattern.

pilots.name: HumanEval guard boundary appendix
pilots.description: 复测 Standard / Entropy / TIGER / Gated TIGER 的 code boundary 行为，确认 guard 是否只是减少 syntax failure 而无法恢复整体性能。

pass_criteria.boundary_pass: Gating improves syntax failure by >=10pp but still does not beat Standard pass@1, supporting appendix-only positioning.
pass_criteria.reopen_method_alert: Gated revision beats Standard by >=2pp pass@1 or broadly improves syntax and runtime, which would reopen the method story.

execution_order.description: 先并行确认 honest compute accounting 与 diagnostic-control gap 两条主 claim 是否成立。
再并行补第二 reasoning benchmark 与 code boundary 附录证据。
